title: Fix Customize tab visibility after admin login

requirements.summary: Fix the Customize tab in Navbar to appear immediately after admin login via Internet Identity without requiring page refresh
acceptanceCriteria: When an admin user logs in via Internet Identity, the Customize tab appears in the navigation bar without requiring a page refresh.
When a non-admin authenticated user logs in, the Customize tab remains hidden.
When no user is logged in, the Customize tab is not visible.
The Customize tab links to the AdminPanel page (/admin or equivalent route).
Logging out hides the Customize tab immediately.

file_operations.description: Review and fix the admin status check logic to ensure the Customize tab becomes visible immediately after login. Verify that the useIsAdmin hook is called correctly and that the component re-renders when the admin status query resolves. Ensure the tab visibility logic correctly evaluates both authentication and admin status, and that logout properly hides the tab.

requirements.summary: Ensure admin status query is refetched after login and Navbar re-renders reactively when admin status becomes true
acceptanceCriteria: After a successful Internet Identity login, the admin status query is refetched automatically.
The Navbar re-renders with the Customize tab as soon as the admin status resolves to true.
No manual page refresh is needed for the tab to appear.

file_operations.description: Review the useIsAdmin query hook implementation to ensure it properly depends on the actor availability and refetches when authentication state changes. Verify the query is enabled only when the actor is ready and that it correctly invalidates on login/logout events. Fix any stale query or timing issues that prevent the admin flag from becoming truthy after authentication.

Ensure the Navbar component correctly subscribes to both authentication state and admin query results. Add query invalidation trigger after successful login if needed to force immediate refetch of admin status. Verify the component properly handles loading states and re-renders when either authentication or admin status changes.
